name: post-direct-t4-go-nogo
title: Post Direct T4 Go/No-Go
description: After direct R1T4 failed, determine whether VeriCurve-RV should continue via layout-aware RTile x TTile curve-shaping kernels, schedule-variant crossover/runtime selection, cache-aware characterization, or stop. Do not implement controller unless A4 or B2 is GO.
creator: codex
